title: Communauté de communes de la Région de Rambervillers
summary: The Communauté de communes de la Région de Rambervillers is an administrative association of communes in the Vosges département of eastern France and in the region of Grand Est. It has its administrative offices at Rambervillers. Its area is 328.8 km2, and its population was 12,999 in 2019.
text:
The Communauté de communes de la Région de Rambervillers is an administrative association of communes in the Vosges département of eastern France and in the region of Grand Est. It has its administrative offices at Rambervillers. Its area is 328.8 km2, and its population was 12,999 in 2019.

Composition
As of 2022, the association comprises 30 communes:
